name: aether
description: Personal style memory, prompt refinement, and explicit image generation workflow plugin for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Capture styles, refine prompts, and record explicit image generations.
interface.longDescription: Aether treats reference images plus source prompts as style-capture inputs by default, turns them into reusable style cards, refines fuzzy text prompts with Codex, and records generation runs only when the user explicitly asks to create new images.
defaultPrompt: 用 $aether-orchestrator 沉淀这组参考图的共同风格
用 $aether-orchestrator 精修这段生图提示词
用 $aether-orchestrator 基于精修提示词生成图片并记录
